message:
I am thinking...: I have successfully created all the files required for the restaurant management application as per the initial requirements.

The files created are:
1. package.json
2. tsconfig.json
3. next.config.js
4. prisma/schema.prisma
5. src/app/layout.tsx
6. src/app/page.tsx
7. src/app/globals.css
8. src/app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts
9. src/app/api/restaurants/route.ts
10. src/app/api/menu/route.ts
11. src/app/api/orders/route.ts
12. src/app/dashboard/page.tsx
13. src/app/auth/login/page.tsx
14. src/app/auth/register/page.tsx
15. src/components/Navbar.tsx
16. src/components/RestaurantCard.tsx
17. src/components/MenuItemForm.tsx
18. src/components/OrderTable.tsx
19. src/middleware.ts
20. .env.example

I have completed the task of creating the full-stack restaurant management application structure. I will now signal completion.
